title: Casting UTF16 to numeric types fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (value) VALUES (CAST(x'003300330000' AS TEXT));
INSERT INTO test_table (value) VALUES (CAST('3x' AS TEXT));
SELECT id, CAST(value AS INTEGER) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, CAST(value AS DOUBLE PRECISION) FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Casting UTF16 encoded strings to numeric types
